purpose: List contents of a folder. TWO sibling endpoints exist — they are NOT interchangeable.

contents.returns: FULL folder contents: subfolders AND filed documents (type in {Folder, KCForms, LeadSheet, Report, Workpaper}).
contents.use_for: Mapping/inventorying a binder, finding filed workpapers. THIS is scripts.wpm.folder_get and scripts.binder_map.

pseudo_folder_ids.-4: Unfiled KC Forms (often 204 No Content when empty)

folders_only.returns: Child FOLDERS only — every row is type=Folder. Filed documents are OMITTED.
folders_only.use_for: Tree-node expansion in the UI. DO NOT use to inventory contents — it silently loses every document and returns 200.
folders_only.gotcha: This is the call that fires when you click to expand a node in the binder tree, so it is what gets captured first. Easy to grab by mistake.

transport: XMLHttpRequest from engagement origin (fetch fails CORS)
row_shape: { engagementId, locationId, parentLocationId, index, type, name, documentIndex, documentId, reportId, fileId, fileExtension, documentStatus, formStatus, children[], isChildExist, ... }
notes: The contents endpoint returns subfolders inline as type=Folder rows; documents are top-level rows, NOT nested in a row's children[] (children[] stays empty in practice).
Workpaper rows carry the extension in BOTH name and fileExtension — dedupe when rendering.
Full folder skeleton (incl. empty folders) comes from /v1/NewEngagementView/folders/{clientId} = scripts.wpm.folder_tree.
response_kind: FLAT JSON ARRAY of rows - no {lineItems} / {result} wrapper. json.loads(body) is the array.
locale_headers_gotcha: USERLocale / Accept-Language / CountryCode are REQUIRED. Without them: status 200 + empty array [] for EVERY folder (silent failure; confirmed 2026-06-03). scripts.wpm merges http_runner.WPM_LOCALE_HEADERS automatically.
